meta.clustering_principle: Resample whole clusters (donor-pairs / datasets / LODO folds), never individual perturbations, so CIs reflect the true replication unit and are not fake-narrow.
meta.bca_note: BCa used where the bootstrap distribution is smooth/unimodal (undercoverage gaps, ceiling ratio attempted); percentile used where bimodal or heavy-tie (Spearman on small n, bimodal ceiling).

sources.xdataset_transport_spearman: xdataset_transport_raw.json T3 true/pred gap by 9 datasets
sources.gap_transport_spearman: gap_transport_raw.json T3 true/pred gap by 6 donor-pairs
sources.reproducibility_ceiling: reliability_ceiling_raw.json 15 modality-vs-modality median rho (6 donor-pair modalities, 4 donors)
sources.calibration_cov90: calibration_law_raw.json (harness NBOOT=500 perturbation bootstrap; cross_dataset has no stored CI)

xdataset_transport_spearman.note: published +0.32 (p=0.406, n.s.); dataset-clustered bootstrap; 20000 valid reps

reproducibility_ceiling_median_rho.method: percentile cluster bootstrap (resample 6 donor-pair modalities; bimodal shared/disjoint regimes → BCa invalid)
reproducibility_ceiling_median_rho.note: single-contrast reproducibility ceiling (median rho over 15 modality-vs-modality comparisons); only 4 underlying donors

model_pct_of_ceiling.method: percentile cluster bootstrap (committed rho=0.356 fixed; CI propagates ceiling denominator only)
model_pct_of_ceiling.note: model %-of-single-contrast-ceiling = 0.356/median_ceiling*100; committed model Spearman is a fixed external constant with no per-perturbation array to resample

undercoverage_gap_0.80.note: trustlayer_core cross-condition undercoverage gap = nominal 0.80 - empirical; mean empirical cov 0.515

undercoverage_gap_0.90.note: trustlayer_core cross-condition undercoverage gap = nominal 0.90 - empirical; mean empirical cov 0.690

undercoverage_gap_0.95.note: trustlayer_core cross-condition undercoverage gap = nominal 0.95 - empirical; mean empirical cov 0.801

calibration_cov90_in_distribution_identi.method: perturbation bootstrap (harness NBOOT=500); correct unit at this level (single donor-pair modality, no donor clustering)

calibration_cov90_in_distribution_mean_b.method: perturbation bootstrap (harness NBOOT=500); correct unit at this level (single donor-pair modality, no donor clustering)

perturbation bootstrap (harness NBOOT=500); correct unit at this level (single donor-pair modality, no donor clustering)

calibration_cov90_cross_donor_identity.method: perturbation bootstrap (harness NBOOT=500) within single held-out donor-pair fold; donor-clustered companion = undercoverage_gap_* (trustlayer_core, n=6 folds)

calibration_cov90_cross_donor_mean_basel.method: perturbation bootstrap (harness NBOOT=500) within single held-out donor-pair fold; donor-clustered companion = undercoverage_gap_* (trustlayer_core, n=6 folds)

calibration_cov90_cross_donor_ridge_line.method: perturbation bootstrap (harness NBOOT=500) within single held-out donor-pair fold; donor-clustered companion = undercoverage_gap_* (trustlayer_core, n=6 folds)

calibration_cov90_cross_donor_deep_mlp_e.method: perturbation bootstrap (harness NBOOT=500) within single held-out donor-pair fold; donor-clustered companion = undercoverage_gap_* (trustlayer_core, n=6 folds)

calibration_cov90_cross_dataset_identity.method: NOT COMPUTABLE: cross-dataset averages 3 leave-one-dataset-out folds; harness stored only mean coverage (no per-dataset array, no bootstrap CI). Dataset-clustered CI would need per-dataset coverage — not in raw.

calibration_cov90_cross_dataset_mean_bas.method: NOT COMPUTABLE: cross-dataset averages 3 leave-one-dataset-out folds; harness stored only mean coverage (no per-dataset array, no bootstrap CI). Dataset-clustered CI would need per-dataset coverage — not in raw.

calibration_cov90_cross_dataset_ridge_li.method: NOT COMPUTABLE: cross-dataset averages 3 leave-one-dataset-out folds; harness stored only mean coverage (no per-dataset array, no bootstrap CI). Dataset-clustered CI would need per-dataset coverage — not in raw.

calibration_cov90_cross_dataset_hist_gbr.method: NOT COMPUTABLE: cross-dataset averages 3 leave-one-dataset-out folds; harness stored only mean coverage (no per-dataset array, no bootstrap CI). Dataset-clustered CI would need per-dataset coverage — not in raw.

calibration_cov90_cross_dataset_deep_mlp.method: NOT COMPUTABLE: cross-dataset averages 3 leave-one-dataset-out folds; harness stored only mean coverage (no per-dataset array, no bootstrap CI). Dataset-clustered CI would need per-dataset coverage — not in raw.

across_model_spread_cov90_in_distributio.method: NOT COMPUTABLE from stored data: across-model coverage spread = max-min over 5 models on shared test rows; a valid CI needs the joint per-perturbation x per-model coverage-indicator matrix, which the harness did not save (only per-model marginal coverage + per-model perturbation-bootstrap CIs). Reporting point estimate; per-model coverage CIs (shown on figure) bound each model.
